title: Epigram 3. - Spirit Of Plato.
content:
FROM THE GREEK.

    Eagle! why soarest thou above that tomb?
    To what sublime and star-ypaven home
    Floatest thou? -
    I am the image of swift Plato's spirit,
    Ascending heaven; Athens doth inherit
    His corpse below.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Epigram 3. - Spirit Of Plato."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
